hero.subtitle: Reads, interprets and validates PDMs for you. Less risk. Less hours. More confidence.

problem.title: A PDM has hundreds of articles. Your project depends on a handful. Finding them should be automatic.
problem.description: The fragmentation of Municipal Master Plans in Portugal creates a maze of uncertainty for architects, engineers and developers. Manual reading is slow, prone to human error and consumes weeks in preliminary analysis.

steps.title: Upload
steps.description: Upload your PDM or project in PDF.

steps.title: Reading
steps.description: AI interprets the document and structures the content.

steps.title: Extraction
steps.description: Facts, rules and constraints are extracted automatically.

features.label: Academic Rigor
features.title: Applied research. Not a weekend idea.
features.description: ImoHarmonia was born at Guarda Polytechnic Institute from real research in Urban Law and natural language processing. Every technical decision is grounded — it's not a demo, it's a tool built for professionals who cannot afford to make mistakes.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Interested in the project.
contact.description: For academic partnerships, early access testing or technical collaboration.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how you'd like to collaborate.
